rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination By Rsmanda Foreclosure Services, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 8, 2017, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT SERVICELINK TITLE CO.'S Joinder In Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination By RSM&A Foreclosure Services, LLC. GRANTED. See ruling on RSM&A motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 8, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC. GRANTED. Any contribution (equitable comparative contribution, or partial or comparative indemnity, based on comparative negligence or comparative fault) of the settling defendant to joint tortfeasors re: liability for torts asserted by Bradley shall be discharged. This good faith settlement determination does not apply to any tort claims brought by Dolmen, whose claims are separate, independent, and are not considered (and not requested to be considered by the moving party) for Tech-Bilt factors determination of good faith. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Stewart Title Of California. Inc For Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 8, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S Motion For Good Faith Settlement. GRANTED. Any contribution (equitable comparative contribution, or partial or comparative indemnity, based on comparative negligence or comparative fault) of the settling defendant to joint tortfeasors re: liability for torts asserted by Bradley shall be discharged. This good faith settlement determination does not apply to any tort claims brought by Dolmen, whose claims are separate, independent, and are not considered (and not requested to be considered by the moving party) for Tech-Bilt factors determination of good faith. =(501/REQ)
